title: Sovereign Enterprise RSI Operating System
problem: A sovereign enterprise needs more than isolated tools. It needs a multi-agent operating system with aim, strategy, execution, proof, risk control, settlement, rollback, and memory.
mission: Coordinate specialist agent roles—Aim Council, Strategy Desk, Builders, Proof Engineers, Reviewers, Red Team, Treasury, Rollback Desk, and Evidence Office—through proof-backed workflows and AGIALPHA settlement.
incremental: Turns the proof flywheel into an enterprise operating system.
value: Creates the institutional form needed for scalable, accountable, multi-agent enterprise execution.
plans: Sovereign Enterprise RSI Operating System proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
